summary: Completed full e2e testing of JobJapa Admin dashboard (frontend + backend). Backend /api/health and /api/ endpoints work. Frontend loads in mock preview mode as designed. All 14 requested features verified: header/brand, mock banner, 3 stat cards, refresh w/ last-updated timestamp, users table with search/filter/pagination, payments table with search/filter/pagination, and no console errors. 100% pass rate.

issues: Monthly Revenue shows ₦0 because seeded MOCK_PAYMENTS created_at values do not include any success payments in the current month (July 2026). Value renders correctly with ₦ symbol but is 0. Consider seeding at least a few success payments with created_at in the current month so the demo looks meaningful.

action_items: Optional: adjust mockData.js so a subset of successful payments have created_at in the current month, giving the Monthly Revenue card a non-zero value in preview mode.
critical_code_review_comments: supabaseClient.js correctly guards createClient with USE_MOCK_DATA fallback preventing runtime errors on placeholder envs.
PaymentsTable imports Pagination from UsersTable — minor coupling; consider moving Pagination to its own component file for reuse clarity.
computeStats() recalculates on every render; harmless at this data volume (47 users / 68 payments) but wrap in useMemo if data grows.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes — excellent testability.

Backend has CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True — not a real risk here (only /api/health exposed) but note that browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard origins; tighten if credentialed endpoints are added later.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None — used existing MOCK_USERS (47) and MOCK_PAYMENTS (68) from /app/frontend/src/lib/mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is in mock-data mode by design (REACT_APP_SUPABASE_URL/KEY are placeholders). Backend only exposes /api/health and /api/ (all data lives in frontend Supabase client / mockData). Playwright test template in this iteration covers header, mock banner, 3 stat cards, refresh + last-updated diff, users table (search/filter-pro/pagination page 1 prev disabled), payments table (search JJ-/status filters/pagination), console error capture. Users pagination: 5 pages; Payments: 7 pages. Monthly Revenue shows ₦0 in mock mode.
